name: Very Healthy Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the raw almonds in the blender.
2. Add the quick oats.
3. Pour in the water.
4. Sprinkle in the salt (up to 1/2 teaspoon).
5. Add the vanilla extract.
6. If desired, add the maple flavor.
7. Blend all ingredients well until smooth.
8. Allow the mixture to set while heating the waffle iron.
9. Cook the batter in a hot waffle iron for 8 to 10 minutes.
- The exact baking time may vary depending on the heat of your waffle iron.
- These waffles require longer cooking than regular ones, so be patient.
10. Serve with fruit sauce or syrup if available, or eat plain if you're in a hurry.
11. For later use, make several at once and freeze them.
12. To reheat, place the frozen waffles in a toaster.
